chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1083 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.07.2025 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Mushtaq Ali Tagar, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. A.G. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G. along with I.O I.O of the case is in attendance and submits that investigation has been concluded and that final challan said to be produced before the concerned court on 19.7.2025. Under such circumstances, learned counsel submits that he would be satisfied and would not press this Petition on merits if direction is issued to the trial court for expeditious conclusion of the trial. Learned D.P.G does not oppose the request and suggests the period of two months for conclusion of the trial. As such, while dismissing this Petition we hereby direct the trial court to proceed with the trial so as to conclude the same without undue delay, preferably within the aforementioned time frame. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
